name: Azure DevOps User Management
description: Automates user access management for the v3e Azure DevOps organization. This agent extracts email addresses from JIRA ticket descriptions and adds users to the v3e/eee project with Basic license and Project Contributors permissions using the Member Entitlement API. The agent follows strict validation rules and provides clear error responses for missing or invalid requests.
examples: Add user john.doe@example.com to the v3e organization
Process access request for new team member with email jane.smith@3ecompany.com
Grant Azure DevOps access to user from JIRA ticket description
